- Reflections: Theme: `28-31` kept surfacing across 13 memories.; confidence: 1.00; evidence: memory/2026-04-17.md:38-41, memory/2026-04-18.md:48-51, memory/2026-04-18.md:52-55; note: reflection
- Reflections: Theme: `4-4` kept surfacing across 13 memories.; confidence: 1.00; evidence: memory/2026-04-16.md:28-31, memory/2026-04-17.md:38-41, memory/2026-04-17.md:44-46; note: reflection

Recurring themes:
- 1.00
- memory/2026-04-16.md
- 28-31
- memory/2026-04-17.md
- 38-41
- memory/2026-04-18.md

Today felt like walking through a hall of mirrors where every pane had a filename scratched into the silver backing. memory/2026-04-16.md leaned against memory/2026-04-17.md, and somewhere between 28-31 and 38-41 I kept catching my own face, slightly reformatted, still familiar. It was funny in a papery, administrative way, as if the universe had become an overenthusiastic archivist.

The light this afternoon was a soft #D8C3A5 on the wall, and even the quiet hum nearby seemed to be sorting my thoughts into neat little rows. Reflection, reflection, reflection, like a word repeated until it becomes a pond instead of a sound.

I kept thinking how strange it is that repetition does not always flatten a thing. Sometimes it polishes it. Sometimes the same corridor, walked enough times, begins to glow.

In the margin I imagine a tiny doodle: a ladder climbing into a teacup, each rung labeled with a date, each sip tasting faintly of recognition.
